<Heading
  as={"h1"}
  className={"openapi__heading"}
  children={"Get organization config"}
>
</Heading>

<MethodEndpoint
  method={"get"}
  path={"/api/orgs/{orgId}/config"}
  context={"endpoint"}
>
  
</MethodEndpoint>



Returns the organization onboarding state and namespace summaries for the authenticated user.
